titleStmt.title: SII 8.337: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 337. (A.R. No. 62 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 kumbhanāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu navamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ rācarācavaḷanāṭṭu
p pācciṟkūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟut tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ nittakalliyāṇaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyarācaṉeṉ taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu . pāṇṭikulācaṉi
vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭeśaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉai
kkāvuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟkut taṉmatāṉamākak kuṭutta nilamāvatu . Innāṭṭu taṇṭaṉkuṟaiyil taṇṭaṅkuṟaiUṭaiyāṉ tevāṇṭāṉāṉa teṉkaraināṭṭuveḷāṉum
taṇṭaṅkuṟaiUṭaiyāṉ perumāḷum ceyyāmaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ teṟṟi poṟkoyilveḷāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭārumpakkal muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ mutaliyār pāṇ
ṭiyarāyar vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyarāy Ivar Apāvattu Eṉṉutum Eṅkaḷ mātākkaḷutumāṉa nilattu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ivvāṭ
ṭai mārkaḻimātattu nāṉ taṉmatāṉamāka nirvāttuk kuṭutta puṉcey 7 + 1/10 Innilam Eḻe Iraṇṭu māvukkum Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai murimuriveli Ellai
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāveri niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Apputikuṟai Ellaikkuk kiḻakku
m vaṭapāṟkellai paḻaṅkāveri niroṭukālukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattut taṇṭaṅkuṟaiUṭaiyāṉ Āḷa
ppiṟantāṉāṉa teṉkaraināṭṭuveḷāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār kāṇiĀṉa 1/4 + 1/40 + 1/160 Innilam kāle Araimā Araikkāṇi nikki mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅ
ṅka 6 + 3/4 + 1/20m Inta murimuriveliEllaikkuk kiḻakkum māvoṭutoṭṭamum paṭāraṉpaṟṟum Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭu Eṅkaḷutāṉa puṉceynilattu Appūti
yāroḻukkaikku meṟku nercera mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṭṭa 1/4 + 1/20m Āka Innāyaṉāṟku taṉmatāṉamāka nirvārttu kuṭutta puṉcey 7 + 1/10
Innilam Eḻe Iraṇṭumāvum mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Ivvāṭṭai mārkaḻimātatte taṉmatāṉamāka nirvārttuk kuṭuttu Innāḷvaraiyum pramā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭāte niṉṟamaiyil Iṟṟaināḷāl taṉmatāṉa pramāṇaicaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukkut tuṟai
yūruṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭiyarāyaṉeṉ Innilam Eḻe Iraṇṭumāvil meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum Āṟum Āṟiṭu
paṭukaiyum potuvum potuvāriyum pākamum pākāciriyamum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Uḷpaṭa taṉmatāṉamākak kuṭuttamaiyil Innilattukku Ivarkaḷ veṇṭi
ṉapote taṉmatāṉa pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭaveṉākavum . kuṭuttilenākil Inta taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa Icavutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvutākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu taṉma
taṉmatāṉap piramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukkut tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ
A few letters are wanting in the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.337 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
